title: Programmes & Courses
content: Programmes & Courses Programs Offered : B.Tech. (Computer Science and Engineering) : Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Computer Science & Engineering B.Tech. Course Curriculum B.Tech. Course Outline Syllabus Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Cyber Security (CS) Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in UX-UI Design Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Full Stack Software Development B.Tech. (Information Technology) : Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Information Technology B.Tech. Course Curriculum B.Tech. Course Outline Syllabus Proficiency & Minor Programme offered by CSE & IT PG Courses Offered: M.Tech.: The Program is offered with the following specializations: (a) Computer Science and Engineering (General) (b) Computer Science and Engineering (Information Security) (c) Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) Ph. D. (Computer Science and Engineering) : The award of the Ph.D degree is in recognition of high academic achievements demonstrated by independent research and application of knowledge to the solution of technical and scientific problems. Creative and productive inquiry is the basic requirement underlying research work. The academic program leading to the degree involves fulfilling course credit requirements, residential requirements and a thesis giving a critical account of the research carried out, in any of the areas listed below. Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Networks, Computer Systems Architecture, Cyber Security, Software Engineering and Information Systems, Image Information Processing, Parallel and Distributed Computing, Database systems and Datamining. Doctoral Programme Monitoring Committee Ph.D(CSE) Qualifying Examination Syllabus Sample Problems for Ph.D. Qualifying Examination
